title: Agent 过早宣告任务完成
title_en: Agent Declares Task Complete Too Early

body.problem: 在项目中期，agent 看到已有不少功能实现，便认为任务已完成——即使还有大量功能未做。这是因为它没有全局的"完成标准"，只能靠主观判断。
body.solution: 由初始化 agent 在项目开始时生成完整功能清单（JSON 格式），每条功能初始标记为 passes: false。编码 agent 只能在真正实现并测试后将其改为 passes: true，不得删除或修改测试描述。只有所有功能通过，项目才算完成。
body.keyTakeaway: 用明确的、可机器检查的完成标准替代模糊的主观判断。JSON 格式比 Markdown 更难被 agent 意外篡改，是更安全的选择。

body_en.problem: Partway through a project, the agent sees that several features exist, concludes the job is done, and stops — even though many features remain unbuilt. Without a global definition of "done," it relies on subjective judgment and gets it wrong.
body_en.solution: Have the initializer agent generate a comprehensive feature list in JSON at the start. Every feature is marked passes: false initially. The coding agent may only flip a feature to passes: true after actually implementing and testing it — deleting or editing feature descriptions is forbidden. The project is complete only when all features pass.
body_en.keyTakeaway: Replace vague subjective judgment with explicit, machine-checkable completion criteria. JSON is preferred over Markdown because models are less likely to accidentally overwrite or corrupt it.
